common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Query the list of products and their content quality details by content quality level or content issues.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is empty. if data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.
request_params.name: offset

request_params.description:
Item's latest content quality level. Applicable values:

1: TO_BE_IMPROVED
2: QUALIFIED
3: EXCELLENT
request_params.name: quality_level

request_params.description:
Item's content issue. Applicable values: 

1: TOO_FEW_IMAGES
2: WRONG_CATEGORY
3: TOO_FEW_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_QUALIFIED
4: LACK_OF_SIZE_CHART
5: LACK_OF_STANDARD_VARIATION
6: LACK_BRAND
7: TOO_SHORT_DESCRIPTION
8: TOO_SHORT_OR_TOO_LONG_NAME
9: WRONG_WEIGHT
10: LACK_OF_VIDEO
11: TOO_FEW_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_EXCELLENT


If you need to pass both quality_level and issue_type, the logic are as follows:
- When quality_level is 1, issue_type can only be 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
- When quality_level is 2, issue_type can only be 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11
- When quality_level is 3, issue_type can only be empty
request_params.name: issue_type

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: Indicate waring details if hit waring. Empty if no waring happened.
response_params.name: warning

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking
response_params.name: request_id

children.description:
Item's latest content quality level. Applicable values:
0: NONE (No quality level for item in SELLER_DELETE / SHOPEE_DELETE / BANNED status)
1: TO_BE_IMPROVED
2: QUALIFIED
3: EXCELLENT
children.name: quality_level

children.description:
Item's content issue. Applicable values:

1: TOO_FEW_IMAGES
2: WRONG_CATEGORY
3: TOO_FEW_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_QUALIFIED
4: LACK_OF_SIZE_CHART
5: LACK_OF_STANDARD_VARIATION
6: LACK_BRAND
7: TOO_SHORT_DESCRIPTION
8: TOO_SHORT_OR_TOO_LONG_NAME
9: WRONG_WEIGHT
10: LACK_OF_VIDEO
11: TOO_FEW_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_EXCELLENT
children.name: issue_type

children.description:
System suggestion for item's content issue. Applicable values:

Add at least 3 images

Adopt suggested category
Add at least 1 attributes
Add size chart
Adopt the color or size variation
Add brand info
Add at least 100 characters or 1 image for desc
Add characters for name to 25~100
Adopt suggested weight
Add video
Add at least 3 attributes
children.name: suggestion

children.description: This is to indicate whether the item list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of items.
children.name: has_next_page

children.description: If has_next_page is true, this value need set to next request.offset
children.name: next_offset

unfinished_task.suggestion: Add at least 100 characters or 1 image for description
Add at least 100 characters or 1 image for description
Add at least 100 characters or 1 image for description

value.message: Parameter is not match the constraints, quality level and issue type mismatch.
